risk_rationale: The new Australian regulation requires a minimum age of 16 for social media accounts, which conflicts with TikTok's current global default minimum registration age of 13. This represents a material compliance gap that requires immediate product changes to avoid potential regulatory action.

compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Minimum age of 16 for social media accounts
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The new regulation mandates a higher minimum age for account creation than TikTok's current policy, necessitating changes to comply with Australian law.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: No specific requirement for robust age verification mechanisms
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The regulation requires robust age verification mechanisms, which may not be fully aligned with TikTok's current practices.

remediations.title: Update Minimum Age Requirement for Australian Users
remediations.description: Implement changes to the account registration process to enforce a minimum age of 16 for users in Australia. This includes updating the age-gated account controls to reflect the new legal requirement.
acceptance_criteria: Users in Australia cannot register for an account if they are under 16 years old.
Age verification mechanisms are implemented to ensure compliance with the new regulation.

remediations.title: Implement Robust Age Verification Mechanisms
remediations.description: Develop and integrate robust age verification mechanisms for Australian users to comply with the new legislation. This may include third-party verification services or enhanced document verification processes.
acceptance_criteria: Age verification process is robust and compliant with the Australian regulation.
Verification mechanisms are tested and validated for effectiveness.

business_impact: Failure to comply with the new Australian regulation could result in significant legal and financial penalties, as well as reputational damage in a key market.
recommended_actions: Prioritize the implementation of age verification enhancements for the Australian market.
Coordinate with legal and compliance teams to ensure all changes meet regulatory requirements.
Communicate upcoming changes to Australian users to ensure transparency and compliance awareness.
